name: Othrelos
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing average middle-class clothing in discreet nuances - a brown shirt with light brown linens and thick cowhide shoes. Carries an iron dagger, his house key, his torch, and a leveled amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: secretive, skilled, cautious, social
Role: Othrelos is an agent residing in the northeast section of the Elven Gardens District in the Imperial City. He is an advanced trainer in Sneak, claiming there is no law against it. He is also a member of the Thieves Guild.
Home Location Information: His house in the northeast section of the Elven Gardens District.
Daily Routine: Othrelos spends all his nights wandering around on the ground floor with his "friend" Mandil. On all days but Loredas, he continues this wandering until 1pm when he leaves for the Market District to browse in the Gilded Carafe. He leaves the store at 5pm and returns home in time for dinner between 6pm and 8pm. The rest of the evening is spent with Mandil on the ground floor. On Loredas, he is on the ground floor until 10am when he travels to the Arboretum for relaxation, returning at 5pm.
Monthly Travel: On the 7th of each month at midnight, Othrelos lights his torch and starts his long journey to Skingrad. He arrives the next morning and checks into the West Weald Inn just before noon, mingling with regulars until 8pm when he takes an evening stroll near Glarthir's house. At 4am he returns to the inn. On the 8th at 8pm, he strolls outside again until midnight when he returns to the Imperial City.
Relationship with Mandil: Othrelos lives most of his life in the company of Mandil, who owns a key to Othrelos' house. They spend considerable time together, particularly wandering the ground floor at night and in the evenings.
Training Services: As an advanced Sneak trainer, Othrelos offers his services at specific times, though his unfortunate habit of locking the door makes it difficult to reach him at home without breaking and entering. During his monthly trip to Skingrad, he offers services twenty-four hours a day.
Guild Activities: During The Ultimate Heist, the final rendezvous with the Gray Fox takes place in Othrelos' house. He waits patiently outside while the secret meeting is conducted in private.
Personality - The Discreet Operator: Othrelos is secretive and cautious, wearing discreet clothing and maintaining a low profile despite his criminal affiliations. He's skilled in the art of sneaking and claims there's no law against teaching it. He's social enough to maintain his friendship with Mandil and make regular trips to Skingrad for socializing, but careful about his security, keeping his door locked most of the time. His role in the Thieves Guild is significant enough that the Gray Fox uses his house for important meetings, suggesting he's a trusted member of the organization.
author: Bethesda
